sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $246000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: The customer portal is letting users cancel subscriptions mid-term without refund logic. Annual plan renewal should create a draft invoice 7 days before renewal, not 3.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $271000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Annual plan for 2026: headcount grows from 45 to 72, OpEx from $8M to $14M. Stock option plan: 4000 shares reserved for Q2 hires, 2500 remaining after current offers.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $73000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: Feature flag policy: use flags for any change that could break existing users; remove within 30 days. Product roadmap Q2: RAG ingestion, search API, connector marketplace, rerank controls.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $432000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: Trademark filing for the Hiveloop name in the EU is in examiner review, 6 months expected. Vendor risk assessment for new SaaS tools: security, privacy, cost, contract review.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $315000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Privacy policy needs updating to reflect the new sub-processor for rerank (SiliconFlow). GDPR data subject access request: must respond within 30 days. Tooling under internal/privacy/.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $191000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: GitHub private repo docs are leaking into public search because the access_type wasn't set at ingest. ACL filter performance degrades at 500k+ chunks per tenant — we need to partition by org.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $109000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: PRD for the self-service org invites feature: requirements, wireframes, metrics to track. Churn analysis: 3 enterprise customers churned this quarter, all cited lack of SCIM provisioning.

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $327000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Compensation bands for L4/L5/L6 engineers in SF vs NYC vs remote; updated quarterly. Diversity sourcing: 40% of pipeline from URM channels; measured weekly.

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $112000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Audit engagement letter signed with Ernst & Young; fieldwork starts October. Annual plan for 2026: headcount grows from 45 to 72, OpEx from $8M to $14M.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $87000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Core Web Vitals: LCP is 4.2s on the pricing page because the hero image is eagerly loaded. React Query cache invalidation after org switch isn't clearing the /api/projects query.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $155000. Stage: Closed Won.

Notes: Diversity sourcing: 40% of pipeline from URM channels; measured weekly. Referral bonus: $5000 at start, $5000 at 6 months. Doubled for senior and staff hires.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $70000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT. Alembic downgrade path for migration 0038 is broken — it references a column that was renamed in 0041.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $299000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: We need row-level encryption for the PII columns; Postgres pgcrypto is the shortest path. Vault token TTL is 30d but the auto-renew cron only runs weekly — tokens expire mid-week sometimes.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $156000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Tailwind's new v4 engine changed how arbitrary values are parsed; our design tokens broke. Core Web Vitals: LCP is 4.2s on the pricing page because the hero image is eagerly loaded.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $337000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping. Reindexing from scratch is the only way to change embedding models. Need a zero-downtime migration path.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $321000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Critical CVE in the postgres-driver version we're pinning; upgrade path breaks the prepared-statement cache. SOC 2 auditor flagged that our secret rotation for AWS IAM keys is quarterly, not monthly.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $20000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well. Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $118000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Greenhouse ATS integration with Hiveloop for candidate tracking. Candidate NPS survey after every loop, won or lost, to improve the experience.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $404000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Laptop preferences: MBP M-series, 32GB or 64GB RAM depending on role, external keyboard/mouse on request. Week 1 goal: ship a small PR. Week 2: pair with oncall. Week 4: first solo oncall shift.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $270000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Critical CVE in the postgres-driver version we're pinning; upgrade path breaks the prepared-statement cache. Pen test found an IDOR in the /api/users/:id endpoint — we're checking auth but not scope.

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $114000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Churn analysis: 3 enterprise customers churned this quarter, all cited lack of SCIM provisioning. NPS dropped 3 points this quarter; top complaint is ingestion latency on Confluence.

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $95000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Evaluation harness: 500 labeled queries, we A/B test embedding models nightly against this set. LoRA adapter size for the intent classifier is 40MB; inference on the edge is fine, cold start is not.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $452000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.

sections.text:

Notes: Bundle size regressed 300kb because we accidentally imported all of lodash instead of lodash/debounce. Storybook stories for the Button component are out of date; the variant prop has 7 values now, stories have 3.

sections.text:

sections.text:

Notes: The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval. Chunk overlap at 20% isn't enough for long-form legal docs; bump to 30% for that tenant.

sections.text:

Notes: Proration is wrong when a customer downgrades mid-cycle; we're crediting too much. Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel.

Notes: Brand guidelines updated: new logo, new typefaces, new color palette. Asset library in Figma. Launch campaign for the search API: blog, Twitter thread, HN launch post, ProductHunt.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $41000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: Hydration mismatch warning on the dashboard — server renders timestamp in UTC, client in local. React Query cache invalidation after org switch isn't clearing the /api/projects query.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $183000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout. Password reset tokens are not being invalidated after a successful reset — they remain valid for 15 minutes.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $481000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Cost per 1M tokens for text-embedding-3-large is $0.13; fine-tuning Qwen is $0.007 per 1M. 18x cheaper. Retrieval augmentation: we're pulling top-50 chunks but the LLM context window is 128k — room to spare.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $85000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: GitHub private repo docs are leaking into public search because the access_type wasn't set at ingest. Ingest pipeline is losing mini-chunks when a section is exactly at the boundary token count.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $315000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Open-source license audit: we're using 3 AGPL deps that need to be replaced before enterprise launch. Data Processing Addendum updated for the new subprocessors list — add SiliconFlow and OpenAI.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $228000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Vault token TTL is 30d but the auto-renew cron only runs weekly — tokens expire mid-week sometimes. Incident: an admin token was committed to a public gist. Rotated, scoped all tokens down.

sections.text:

Notes: Refresh token rotation broke after the move to Keycloak 24 — tokens issued before the upgrade are being rejected. OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $379000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Pen test found an IDOR in the /api/users/:id endpoint — we're checking auth but not scope. Critical CVE in the postgres-driver version we're pinning; upgrade path breaks the prepared-statement cache.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $296000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel. Credit notes issued via the dashboard are not syncing back to QuickBooks.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $28000. Stage: Closed Won.

Notes: Stripe webhook for customer.subscription.trial_will_end is not being dispatched to our handler. Credit notes issued via the dashboard are not syncing back to QuickBooks.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $409000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Launch campaign for the search API: blog, Twitter thread, HN launch post, ProductHunt. Conference sponsorships Q2: KubeCon, SRECon, AI Engineer Summit. Total spend $120k.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $439000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: Password reset tokens are not being invalidated after a successful reset — they remain valid for 15 minutes. Rate-limit the /auth/otp endpoint to 5 requests per minute per email; currently it's unbounded.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $269000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Annual plan renewal should create a draft invoice 7 days before renewal, not 3. Usage-based metering events are being counted twice on retry when the initial request times out.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $426000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $402000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries. The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $416000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Diversity sourcing: 40% of pipeline from URM channels; measured weekly. Debrief happens within 2 hours. Use the rubric, not vibes. Flag any bias in the feedback.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $19000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th. PagerDuty integration is missing the severity field on alerts coming from Alertmanager.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $289000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Stock option plan: 4000 shares reserved for Q2 hires, 2500 remaining after current offers. Bank account for the UK entity is open; move GBP-denominated customers to it by July.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $180000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: SOC 2 Type II audit window is July 1 through June 30; Vanta is our automation platform. Contract review SLA: 5 business days for standard, 10 for redlined.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $335000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: SEO: we rank #3 for 'RAG ingestion pipeline' on Google; aim for top spot by end of Q3. Ad spend for this quarter: $40k across Google and LinkedIn, measured by signups not clicks.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $396000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Vendor risk assessment for new SaaS tools: security, privacy, cost, contract review. Privacy policy needs updating to reflect the new sub-processor for rerank (SiliconFlow).
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $164000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Paging policy: Sev1 pages primary, Sev2 Slack-only during business hours, Sev3 ticket only. Runbook for the connector-pruner stuck-in-progress state: how to identify, kill, resume.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $208000. Stage: Closed Won.

Notes: ARR forecast model updated with new customer cohort data; confidence interval tightened. Audit engagement letter signed with Ernst & Young; fieldwork starts October.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $311000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Paging policy: Sev1 pages primary, Sev2 Slack-only during business hours, Sev3 ticket only. Blameless postmortem template: include a timeline, contributing factors, action items with owners.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $303000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: GDPR data subject access request: must respond within 30 days. Tooling under internal/privacy/. Trademark filing for the Hiveloop name in the EU is in examiner review, 6 months expected.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $291000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel. Stripe webhook for customer.subscription.trial_will_end is not being dispatched to our handler.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $359000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Open-source license audit: we're using 3 AGPL deps that need to be replaced before enterprise launch. Master Services Agreement redline with enterprise customer: they want data-residency guarantees in EU.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $80000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: SEO: we rank #3 for 'RAG ingestion pipeline' on Google; aim for top spot by end of Q3. Launch campaign for the search API: blog, Twitter thread, HN launch post, ProductHunt.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $462000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels. StatefulSet volume claim template was changed but existing PVCs aren't being updated — they need to be recreated.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $165000. Stage: Closed Won.

Notes: OpenTelemetry span attribute `http.status_code` is missing from the ingress traces. SLO burn-rate alert is too noisy during weekends. Multi-window multi-burn-rate policy needed.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $441000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: JSONB query on the metadata column isn't hitting the GIN index. Query planner picks seq scan. The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $189000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered. Service accounts need to support client_credentials grant for the new partner integration.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $340000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Debrief happens within 2 hours. Use the rubric, not vibes. Flag any bias in the feedback. Diversity sourcing: 40% of pipeline from URM channels; measured weekly.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $255000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Synthetic uptime check is failing because the TLS certificate was renewed but the CA bundle wasn't updated. OpenTelemetry span attribute `http.status_code` is missing from the ingress traces.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $26000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Product roadmap Q2: RAG ingestion, search API, connector marketplace, rerank controls. Launch plan for the new dashboard: beta for 2 weeks with 5 customers, then GA.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $191000. Stage: Closed Won.

Notes: Core Web Vitals: LCP is 4.2s on the pricing page because the hero image is eagerly loaded. React Query cache invalidation after org switch isn't clearing the /api/projects query.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $21000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $152000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Usage-based metering events are being counted twice on retry when the initial request times out. Invoice PDF generation times out for customers with > 500 line items — need to paginate.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $305000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Brand guidelines updated: new logo, new typefaces, new color palette. Asset library in Figma. Launch campaign for the search API: blog, Twitter thread, HN launch post, ProductHunt.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Umbrella: $376000. Stage: Closed Won.

Notes: Candidate NPS survey after every loop, won or lost, to improve the experience. Referral bonus: $5000 at start, $5000 at 6 months. Doubled for senior and staff hires.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $465000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: We need row-level encryption for the PII columns; Postgres pgcrypto is the shortest path. A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Wayne Enterprises: $337000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $198000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Candidate NPS survey after every loop, won or lost, to improve the experience. Greenhouse ATS integration with Hiveloop for candidate tracking.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $215000. Stage: Negotiation.

Notes: Prompt engineering for the summarization agent: we're getting too many bullet points, want paragraphs. Retrieval augmentation: we're pulling top-50 chunks but the LLM context window is 128k — room to spare.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Globex Inc: $118000. Stage: Closed Lost.

Notes: Rolling deployments are causing a 2-3 second error spike because readiness probes lag behind container start. Ingress controller is returning 502s intermittently; config reload timing is racing with upstream rotation.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $281000. Stage: Qualification.

Notes: Hallucination rate measured on the support-bot corpus: 4.7% with citations, 12% without. LoRA adapter size for the intent classifier is 40MB; inference on the edge is fine, cold start is not.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $59000. Stage: Proposal.

Notes: Tech screen is 60min: 2 behavioral, 2 technical. Interviewer guide updated 2026-04-01. Referral bonus: $5000 at start, $5000 at 6 months. Doubled for senior and staff hires.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Acme Corp: $362000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel. Credit notes issued via the dashboard are not syncing back to QuickBooks.
sections.title: Opportunity

sections.text:
Opportunity with Initech: $380000. Stage: Prospecting.

Notes: Bundle size regressed 300kb because we accidentally imported all of lodash instead of lodash/debounce. Storybook stories for the Button component are out of date; the variant prop has 7 values now, stories have 3.
sections.title: Opportunity
